metcon.name: PART B
metcon.description:
8RFT
30ft shuttle run
15ft overhead lunges
15ft handstand walk or bear crawl

hypertrophy.reasoning: Metcon hammers shoulders, core, and legs; these accessories build antagonists and non-fatigued muscles.

raw_text:
Partner WOD | Score Time
PARTNER WORKOUT for time
Part A - time cap 27 mins
800 m run together
60 Wall Balls
40 Pull-ups (scale to jumping/ring rows)
500 m run together
30 Toes-to-Bar (or knee raises)
40 Wall Balls
300 m run together
20 Bar Muscle-ups / Chest-to-Bar / Pull-ups
20 Wall Balls
200 m run together
Scale pull ups to ring rows
Make your gymnastics harder in each round
PART B | 8RFT
30ft shuttle run
15ft overhead lunges
15ft handstand walk or bear crawl
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: PART B. Workout: 30ft shuttle run, 15ft overhead lunges, 15ft handstand walk or bear crawl. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
